title: CreativeTabSearch
description: A mod introducing a searching bar above the creative tab so as to filter specific creative tab menus matching your input.
body:
[简体中文](https://github.com/srcres258/CreativeTabSearch/blob/main/README-zh.md) **Fabric** is now supported, but the required [**Fabric API**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) must be installed. # Description This mod adds a searching bar above the creative tab so as to filter specific creative tab menus matching your input.
**Note that you can only use this mod on the client.** Attempting to add it to the dedicated server will result in a crash. # Usage When the mod loaded you will see an input box above your creative inventory: ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e2e35ed37122ebcb938e74d97a78506902cd275.png) Input something in the box and creative tabs containing the input will be filtered: ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4605d072902b675a62c23da895178b037b094.png) ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee3c1f7470c0e8d78f1e37f108026508c2816805.png) Your input can be removed immediately by clicking the "X" button beside the box. ![Screenshot 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76f0c470b7bd5301b9023f2efeb1709b5eb4957d.png) ![Screenshot 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8e49cdf946788d8372de9c0a0e8e280c554198f.png) International languages are supported as well, e.g. Chinese (Simplified). ![Screenshot 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1bb1cd4a4d46374a192b16eb2846723df199a3.png) Since version 0.1.2, advanced searching options are supported (with the prefix "@" specified). @modid：Search for tabs matching the modid inputed. Multiple inputs can be given (only one given in the screenshot as an example): ![Screenshot 7](https://github.com/srcres258/CreativeTabSearch/blob/main/docs/ss7.png?raw=true) @itemid：Search for tabs containing the item which matches the input，Multiple inputs can be given (only one given in the screenshot as an example): ![Screenshot 8](https://github.com/srcres258/CreativeTabSearch/blob/main/docs/ss8.png?raw=true) # License This project is licensed under [GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 only](https://spdx.org/licenses/LGPL-3.0-only.html).
